params.name: Sistine Madonna
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.08%)
params.description:
On Oct 26, 1514 AD, Raphael completed the painting Sistine Madonna for San Sisto, Piacenza. The Sistine Madonna supersedes the cold and unapproachable Madonnas of the Middle Ages. The triangular composition composed of the Virgin Mary and two saints below is well balanced. Raphael created an illusion of depth in the picture by leaving space between the characters. [The Sistine Madonna Info] Specification: 265x196cm
Type: Oil Painting
Collected by: Zwinger museum, Dresden, Germany
